hops.context: In this work, we propose a two-stage approach to HW-NAS
In this work, we propose a two-stage approach to HW-NAS with Synthetic Devices

question: What is the primary function of the two-stage approach proposed by Giuseppe Averta in the context of Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search?

options.A: It enhances the performance of neural networks on standard hardware platforms.
options.B: It primarily focuses on reducing computational costs in conventional hardware settings.
options.C: It is specifically designed to optimize neural architectures using synthetic devices.
options.D: It aims to integrate real-time data processing with neural network deployment.

explanation: The two-stage approach developed by Giuseppe Averta in the context of Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search (HW-NAS) uses synthetic devices, indicating its primary function is to optimize neural architectures specifically for these devices.
context: Giuseppe Averta | In this work, we propose a two-stage approach to HW-NAS | In this work, we propose a two-stage approach to HW-NAS with Synthetic Devices
